fields.name: title
fields.label: SEO Title
fields.description: Custom title for search results. Leave blank to use the page title. Keep under 60 characters.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Meta Description
fields.description: Description shown in search results. Aim for 150–160 characters.

fields.name: keywords
fields.label: Keywords
fields.description: Comma-separated keywords, e.g. kiwisaver, retirement, savings

fields.name: image
fields.label: Social Share Image
fields.description: Image shown when shared on social media. Recommended size: 1200x630px.

fields.name: image_alt
fields.label: Social Image Alt Text
fields.description: Describe the social share image for accessibility.

fields.name: canonical
fields.label: Canonical URL
fields.description: Override the canonical URL for this page. Leave blank to use the page's own URL. Use only when this page duplicates content from elsewhere.

fields.name: noindex
fields.label: Hide from search engines
fields.description: When enabled, search engines will not index this page.

fields.name: sitemap_exclude
fields.label: Exclude from sitemap
fields.description: When enabled, this page will not appear in the sitemap.xml file.

fields.name: schema_type
fields.label: Schema.org Page Type
fields.description: Override the auto-detected schema type for this page. Leave blank for automatic detection.

fields.name: custom_schema
fields.label: Custom JSON-LD Schema
fields.description: Paste raw JSON-LD here to override the auto-generated schema for this page. Leave blank to use the auto-generated schema (recommended). Validate with Google's Rich Results Test before publishing.

fields.name: page_block
fields.label: Page Block (template key)
fields.description: Hugo partial name. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

fields.name: intro_cta_url
fields.label: Intro - CTA Button URL
fields.description: Use {{appUrl}} as a placeholder for the app URL, or a full path like /faq/.

fields.name: need_image_alt
fields.label: What You'll Need - Illustration Alt Text

fields.name: cta_button_url
fields.label: Final CTA - Button URL
fields.description: Use {{appUrl}} as a placeholder for the app URL, or a full path.
